title: Highest Individual Score in ODI
answer: The men's ODI highest individual score is 264, made by Rohit Sharma against Sri Lanka at Eden Gardens on 13 November 2014.

title: Fastest Century in ODI
answer: The men's ODI fastest-century record belongs to AB de Villiers, who reached 100 in 31 balls against West Indies in Johannesburg on 18 January 2015.
examples: Who has the fastest century in ODI?

title: Best Bowling Figures in ODI
answer: The best bowling figures in a men's ODI innings are 8 for 19 by Chaminda Vaas against Zimbabwe in Colombo in December 2001.

title: Longest Six
answer: The longest six in cricket is commonly credited to Shahid Afridi at around 158 metres, although long-distance six measurements are not standardized across all eras and broadcasts.
examples: Who hit the longest six in cricket?

title: Fastest T20I Century
answer: The men's T20I fastest-century record is 27 balls, made by Sahil Chauhan against Cyprus on 17 June 2024.
